title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 07 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 07 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 07 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/07/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked all the day.The main contract closed at 756.5,increased of 3.91%. Traders are generally motivated to ship, steelmills are mainly on the sidelines, and there are few transactions in the market. PBF at Tangshan port dealt 815-820 yuan/mt; SSF at Tangshan port dealt 687 yuan/mt.
